creator: etteldor@mail.be
text:
Some additional info which may help finding the culprit:

- The very same setup with a 7.0-BETA4 kernel and system doesn't crash.
- GL applications (glxgears, or even glxinfo) tend to crash Xorg as well
  when xcompmgr is running.
